scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @efs/presets && npm run build --workspace @efs/vue
scripts.check:public-surface: npm run build && node --test tests/packaging.test.mjs tests/public-surface.test.mjs
scripts.lint:standard: npm run build && node packages/cli/bin/efs-lint.mjs standard-app
scripts.lint:standard:ast: npm run build && node packages/cli/bin/efs-lint-ast.mjs standard-app
scripts.demo:build: npm run build && vite build --config apps/standard-demo/vite.config.mjs
scripts.scaffold:standard: npm run build && node packages/cli/bin/efs-scaffold.mjs --preset paginated-list --name StandardListPage --out .tmp/standard-page
scripts.pack:check: npm run build && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @efs/presets && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @efs/vue && npm pack --dry-run --workspace @efs/cli
scripts.ci: npm run test && npm run check:public-surface && npm run lint:standard && npm run lint:standard:ast && npm run govern:standard && npm run demo:build && npm run pack:check
